payload.source_text: The pocket money tracker system allows children to claim pocket money tasks as they are completed throughout the week.
Parents can detail tasks that should be completed and the monetary amount earned for that task.
As a task is completed it is linked to the child that completed it.
The children should be able to see the available tasks and the tasks they have completed that week.
At the end of each week the children can see the total amount they have earned that week.
The Parents can also see a report of how much each child has earned and the tasks they completed so that they can provide the pocket money earned to each child.
At the start of the next week all tasks become available again to be claimed.
Historical task data shall be available.
The resulting system shall be able to operate on iOS 16, Android 9 and Windows 11 or later.

payload.description: Task claiming by children
payload.justification: Signal SG915 describes claiming as a strategic business function. Moderate-high confidence as function is clearly implied by enabling goal.

payload.description: Task-reward definition by parents
payload.justification: Signal SG916 describes definition capability as strategic function for establishing motivational structures.

payload.description: Completion and earnings reporting
payload.justification: Signal SG919 identifies reporting as strategic function supporting oversight and accountability objectives.

payload.description: Task-reward relationship definition for pocket money
payload.justification: Signal SG916 implies strategic entity representing the association between tasks and their rewards. Moderate confidence as entity is inferred from goal context. | Signals SG915 and SG917 reference tasks as things of strategic importance. Clear entity at planner level representing work units.

payload.description: Weekly earnings
payload.justification: Signals SG918 and SG919 identify earnings as strategically important information entity requiring visibility and reporting.

payload.description: Historical data
payload.justification: Signal SG920 identifies historical records as entity requiring preservation. Strategic importance inferred from continuity and audit objectives.

payload.description: Weekly earning and settlement cycle
payload.justification: Signal SG918 references weekly earnings, implying a strategic time cycle for earning accumulation and settlement.

payload.description: Child user role
payload.justification: Multiple signals explicitly reference children as strategic stakeholders with distinct capabilities: claiming tasks, viewing opportunities, and seeing earnings.

payload.description: Parent user role
payload.justification: Signals SG916 and SG919 explicitly identify parents as strategic stakeholders with definition and oversight responsibilities.

payload.description: Enable children to claim completed pocket money tasks during the week
payload.justification: Signal SG915 directly expresses a fundamental business goal for child-facing task completion capability. High confidence due to explicit purpose statement.

payload.description: Provide parents capability to define task-reward relationships as motivational structure
payload.justification: Signal SG916 articulates a clear parental capability goal focused on establishing incentive structures. Strong alignment with strategic Why interrogative.

payload.description: Enable children to understand available task opportunities
payload.justification: Signal SG917 identifies visibility objective for task discovery. Derived as strategic goal supporting child engagement.

payload.description: Enable children to view completed achievements
payload.justification: Signal SG917 identifies visibility objective for achievement tracking. Separate goal from task discovery, warranting distinct CCI per Rule 5.

payload.description: Provide children visibility into weekly earnings to support accountability motivation
payload.justification: Signal SG918 specifies transparency goal with explicit motivational purpose. Very clear strategic goal statement.

payload.description: Provide parents oversight of task completion and earnings
payload.justification: Signal SG919 establishes parental oversight objective. Clear strategic goal for monitoring capability.

payload.description: Enable parental settlement accountability through reporting
payload.justification: Signal SG919 identifies settlement accountability as distinct objective from general oversight, warranting separate CCI.

payload.description: Maintain continuity through historical data preservation
payload.justification: Signal SG920 indicates continuity objective. Derived as strategic goal from preservation requirement.

payload.description: Provide auditability through historical data preservation
payload.justification: Signal SG920 indicates auditability objective. Separate strategic goal from continuity, both supported by same preservation mechanism.

payload.completeness_rule: This register SHALL contain the identifiers of ALL CellContentItem elements present in the ledger.

payload.name: Household Participation
payload.description: Defines who may participate in the family economy system and the fundamental relationship structure between household members in their respective capacities.

payload.name: Family Economic Framework
payload.description: Governs the enterprise commitment to establishing and maintaining the motivational structure through which effort is recognized and rewarded within the household.

payload.name: Contribution Accountability
payload.description: Establishes enterprise commitment to transparent recognition of completed contributions and the participant's ability to demonstrate fulfillment of expectations.

payload.name: Financial Settlement Obligation
payload.description: Defines the enterprise obligation to calculate, disclose, and settle earned value on a recurring basis with full transparency to all stakeholders.

payload.name: Record Stewardship
payload.description: Establishes enterprise responsibility to preserve a complete and auditable record of all economic activity to ensure continuity and accountability over time.

payload.completeness_rule: This register SHALL contain the identifiers of ALL Domain elements present in the ledger.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall recognise children as participants in the household economy.
payload.rationale: Establishes the fundamental participation right of children as a named entity class within the enterprise scope. Who-column role content at Row 1 describes enterprise recognition of participant types.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall recognise parents as participants in the household economy.
payload.rationale: Establishes the fundamental participation right of parents as a named entity class within the enterprise scope. Who-column role content at Row 1 describes enterprise recognition of participant types.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall establish task-reward relationships to recognize and motivate effort within the household.
payload.rationale: Entity definition (What) combined with motivational governance commitment (Why) establishes the enterprise obligation to maintain this structural relationship as part of the household motivational framework.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall provide parents the capability to define task-reward relationships.
payload.rationale: Function (How) and supporting motivation (Why) express a functional capability commitment: enabling parental definition of the motivational structure.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall enable children to identify available task opportunities.
payload.rationale: Motivational goal (Why) expressing a functional commitment to provide visibility of tasks to children as part of the motivational framework.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall enable children to claim completed tasks.
payload.rationale: Consolidates the How-column task claiming function with the Why-column goal to enable claiming of completed pocket money tasks; both express a single enterprise commitment to provide the capability for children to claim tasks they have completed.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall enable children to view completed achievements.
payload.rationale: Why-column goal expressing the enterprise's commitment to provide visibility of completed achievements to children; distinct from the claiming capability.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall establish a weekly cycle for earning and settlement.
payload.rationale: Temporal governance constraint defining the recurring cadence at which the enterprise commits to settlement obligations.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall maintain weekly earnings.
payload.rationale: Defines the core entity obligation — the enterprise is accountable for weekly earnings as a structural element of the domain.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall enable completion and earnings reporting.
payload.rationale: Expresses the enterprise capability to report both task completion and associated earnings — a single cohesive reporting obligation.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall provide children visibility into weekly earnings.
payload.rationale: Motivational goal that becomes an enterprise obligation to make earnings transparent to children, supporting accountability.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall provide parents oversight of task completion and earnings.
payload.rationale: Goal-driven obligation ensuring parents have visibility into both completion status and resulting earnings.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall enable parental settlement accountability through reporting.
payload.rationale: Establishes the enterprise commitment to support parental accountability for settlement via reporting capability.

payload.statement: The enterprise shall maintain a complete and auditable record of all economic activity.
payload.rationale: Consolidates the Why-column governance goals (continuity and auditability) with the What-column entity (historical data) into a single enterprise accountability statement. The obligation subsumes both preservation for continuity and preservation for auditability as facets of maintaining a complete, auditable record.

payload.description: Expresses the fundamental purpose of enabling children to claim completed pocket money tasks during the week.
Articulates parental capability goal to define task-reward relationships as motivational structure.
Identifies visibility objective enabling children to understand available opportunities and completed achievements.
Specifies child-facing transparency goal for weekly earnings visibility supporting accountability motivation.
Establishes parental oversight and settlement accountability objective through earnings and completion reporting.
Indicates continuity and auditability objective through historical data preservation requirement.
